name.fr: Galette à la ciboule (Cong You Bing)

description.en: A hot-water dough laminated with a scallion-flecked fat paste, coiled into a spiral and pan-fried until crisp outside and chewy in flaky spirals within. A northern Chinese breakfast and street-stall favorite, torn into wedges.
description.de: Ein Heißwasserteig, mit einer mit Frühlingszwiebeln gespickten Fettpaste laminiert, zur Spirale aufgerollt und in der Pfanne gebraten, bis er außen knusprig und innen zäh-blättrig ist. Ein nordchinesischer Frühstücks- und Straßenstand-Favorit, in Keile gerissen.
description.es: Una masa de agua caliente laminada con una pasta de grasa moteada de cebolleta, enrollada en espiral y frita en sartén hasta quedar crujiente por fuera y masticable en espirales hojaldradas por dentro. Un favorito del desayuno y los puestos callejeros del norte de China.
description.fr: Une pâte à l'eau chaude feuilletée d'une pâte grasse mouchetée de ciboule, enroulée en spirale et poêlée jusqu'à devenir croustillante à l'extérieur et moelleuse en spirales feuilletées à l'intérieur. Un favori du petit-déjeuner et des étals de rue du nord de la Chine.

origin.note: A home-kitchen staple across northern China, now equally common at street stalls and dim sum restaurants worldwide.

ingredients.note: for coating the dough while it rests
melted, for the you su lamination paste; or use coconut or neutral oil
for the you su lamination paste
or five-spice powder, in the paste

keeping.note: Best straight from the pan while shatteringly crisp; leftovers can be recrisped in a dry skillet. Freezes very well at the rolled, uncooked stage.

method.title: Make hot-water dough
method.summary: Stir boiling water into flour to a shaggy mass, knead by hand, then rest covered 15 minutes and knead smooth.

method.title: Mix the paste
method.summary: Blend melted lard with flour, salt and ground Sichuan pepper into a smooth paste.

method.title: Roll & spread
method.summary: Roll the dough into a large thin rectangle, spread with the paste, and scatter chopped scallions over the top.

method.title: Roll & coil
method.summary: Roll up from the short end into a rope, cut into sections, then coil each piece and tuck the end under.

method.title: Flatten
method.summary: Press and roll each coil gently into a thick round, keeping the spiral layers intact.

method.title: Pan-fry
method.summary: Fry in a lidded pan with a little oil over medium-high heat, about 2 minutes per side, until golden and crisp.

method.title: Rest & cut
method.summary: Let rest briefly, then cut into wedges and serve hot.

source.adaptation: Small quantities of coating and frying oil estimated, since the source didn't fix them precisely; dough and you su paste flour/fat were combined for the total percentages.
